# command: sudo journalctl -u sshd --since 7 days ago --no-pager --output short-iso --utc
# date_utc: 2026-05-20T00:00:00Z

2026-05-18T00:00:01+0000 sanitized-host sshd[1001]: Accepted publickey for deployer from source-a.example.invalid port 50100 ssh2: ED25519
2026-05-18T00:00:02+0000 sanitized-host sshd[1002]: Failed password for invalid user admin from source-b.example.invalid port 50101 ssh2
2026-05-18T00:00:03+0000 sanitized-host sshd[1003]: Invalid user oracle from source-c.example.invalid port 50102
2026-05-18T00:00:04+0000 sanitized-host sshd[1004]: Connection closed by authenticating user root source-d.example.invalid port 50103 [preauth]
2026-05-18T00:00:05+0000 sanitized-host sshd[1005]: kex_exchange_identification: Connection closed by remote host
